*** 1 INJ *** NWS SURVEY TEAM DETERMINED A MULTIPLE VORTEX TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN 4 MILES EAST NORTHEAST OF PAMPA AND MOVED SOUTHEAST TO 5 MILES EAST SOUTHEAST OF THE CITY.
